# whatischapter7.com

> Complete guide to Chapter 7 bankruptcy -- exemptions, eligibility, and what property you keep.

whatischapter7.com is a free, open-source educational resource about Chapter 7 bankruptcy and exemptions. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://whatischapter7.com/: What is Chapter 7 bankruptcy -- the liquidation chapter explained
- https://whatischapter7.com/federal-exemptions.html: Federal bankruptcy exemptions under 11 U.S.C. Section 522(d)
- https://whatischapter7.com/state-exemptions.html: State bankruptcy exemptions -- which states use federal vs state exemptions
- https://whatischapter7.com/homestead.html: Homestead exemption in bankruptcy -- protecting your home equity
- https://whatischapter7.com/vehicles.html: Vehicle exemptions -- how much car equity you can protect
- https://whatischapter7.com/retirement.html: Retirement account protections in bankruptcy -- 401k, IRA, pension
- https://whatischapter7.com/wildcard.html: Wildcard exemption -- protecting any property you choose

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
